# Uniqlo Price Tracker

> A free, daily-updated price tracking tool for Uniqlo Canada.

## What it does

- Tracks prices across hundreds of Uniqlo Canada products, updated once per day
- Shows every item **currently on sale** with exact discount percentages
- Flags **All-Time Low (ATL)** prices — the cheapest a product has ever been recorded
- Displays full **price history charts** for individual products
- Organises products by Uniqlo category (e.g. T-Shirts, Jeans, Outerwear, Knitwear, etc.)
- Covers both Men's and Women's lines

## Who it's for

Shoppers in Canada who want to know when Uniqlo products go on sale or reach their lowest-ever recorded price, without checking the Uniqlo website manually every day.

## Key facts

- Region: Canada (prices in CAD)
- Update frequency: Once per day
- Free to use — no account or sign-up required
- Not affiliated with Uniqlo Co., Ltd.

## URL

https://uniqlotracker.com
